qa_pairs.question: What alternatives are available if my system lacks FUSE support, local storage, or has limited network connectivity for CVMFS?
qa_pairs.answer: If your system lacks FUSE support or local storage, or has limited network connectivity or other restrictions, you may be able to use some other option.

qa_pairs.question: When deploying CVMFS across multiple systems, such as on a cluster or in a laboratory, what are the basic requirements for each individual system?
qa_pairs.answer: When deploying multiple CVMFS clients, each individual system must meet the same requirements as a single system.

qa_pairs.question: Does each system need to meet the same requirements when setting up CVMFS for multiple systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if multiple CVMFS clients are deployed, each system must meet the previously stated requirements for a single system.
